subcodes.first_line: O mother! Grieve not over the loss of thy son; rather pride thyself therein. Indeed this is an occasion for gladness and rejoicing
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مادر از فراق پسر منال بلکه ببال این مقام شادی و سرور است نه مقام کدورت و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
